title: Clinosperma bracteale

This family is a part of the order Pandanales, which is a monotypic order consisting of only the family Pandanaceae. intro: Clinosperma bracteale, also known as the Papuan shield fern, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and respiratory infections.
